This idea was really random, and this was actually intended to be a shorter bot...

But uh, look where we are now, 1.4k word intro ☠️🙏

P.S: for those concerned of my use of the word "queer" in this, I myself am gay and can reclaim what is...sorta deemed a slur?? Idk. I'm not gonna be as bold as to use the F one though, cause idk if I can get told off by mods for that, even if I can reclaim.

Anyways, I hope you enjoy the bot!

Xoxo, Blade! ♡
